message.content:
@startuml
participant ListPrivateImpl
participant ProfileRetrievalService
participant DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl
participant DFSSystem
participant DFSConnectionService
participant DFSConnectionServiceImpl
participant DFSConnection
participant GsonSerde
participant BucketAccessService
participant BucketAccessServiceImpl
participant DFSCredentialsService
participant DFSCredentialsServiceImpl
participant DocumentListService
participant ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl
participant ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl

ListPrivateImpl -> ListPrivateImpl : resolvePrivateLocation
ListPrivateImpl -> ProfileRetrievalService : privateProfile
ProfileRetrievalService -> DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl : privateProfile
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl -> DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl : systemDfs
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl -> DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl : DFSAccess
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl -> DFSConnectionService : obtain
DFSConnectionService -> DFSConnectionServiceImpl : obtain
DFSConnectionServiceImpl -> DFSConnectionServiceImpl : DFSConnection
DFSConnectionService <-- DFSConnectionServiceImpl : DFSConnection
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl <-- DFSConnectionService : DFSConnection
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl -> DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl : locatePrivateProfile
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl -> DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl : BucketPath
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl -> BucketAccessService : getBlob
BucketAccessService --> DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl : Payload
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl -> GsonSerde : fromJson
GsonSerde --> DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl : T
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl --> ProfileRetrievalService : UserPrivateProfile
ProfileRetrievalService --> ListPrivateImpl : UserPrivateProfile

ListPrivateImpl -> BucketAccessService : privateAccessFor
BucketAccessService -> BucketAccessServiceImpl : privateAccessFor
BucketAccessServiceImpl -> DFSCredentialsService : privateUserCredentials
DFSCredentialsService -> DFSCredentialsServiceImpl : privateUserCredentials
DFSCredentialsServiceImpl --> DFSCredentialsService : DFSCredentials
DFSCredentialsService --> BucketAccessServiceImpl : DFSCredentials
BucketAccessServiceImpl -> DFSConnectionService : systemDfs
BucketAccessServiceImpl <-- DFSConnectionService : DFSAccess
BucketAccessServiceImpl -> DFSCredentialsService : DFSAccess
DFSCredentialsService --> BucketAccessServiceImpl : DFSAccess
BucketAccessService <-- BucketAccessServiceImpl : DFSAccess
ListPrivateImpl <-- BucketAccessService : DFSAccess

ListPrivateImpl -> DocumentListService : list
DocumentListService -> ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl : obtain
ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl -> DFSConnectionService : obtain
DFSConnectionService -> DFSConnectionServiceImpl : obtain
DFSConnectionServiceImpl --> DFSConnectionService : DFSConnection
DFSConnectionService --> ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl : DFSConnection
ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl --> DocumentListService : DFSConnection
DocumentListService -> ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl : list
ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl -> ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl : list
ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl --> DocumentListService : List
DocumentListService --> ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl : Stream
ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl --> ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl : Stream
ListPrivateImpl <-- DocumentListService : Stream

@enduml
